---
title: "Student Performance Report"
subtitle: "AAST Classroom Emotion Analytics System"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{geometry}
  - \geometry{margin=2cm}
  - \usepackage{xcolor}
  - \definecolor{aastnavy}{HTML}{002147}
  - \definecolor{aastgold}{HTML}{C9A84C}
  - \usepackage{fancyhdr}
  - \pagestyle{fancy}
  - \fancyhf{}
  - \fancyhead[L]{\textcolor{aastnavy}{\textbf{AAST — Classroom Emotion Analytics}}}
  - \fancyhead[R]{\textcolor{aastgold}{Confidential}}
  - \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
params:
  student_id: "000000000"
  export_dir: "python-api/data/exports"
  api_base:   "http://localhost:8000"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 7, fig.height = 3.5)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(httr2)

EXPORT_DIR <- params$export_dir
API_BASE   <- params$api_base
STUDENT_ID <- params$student_id

# Load emotion data for this student
emotions_path <- file.path(EXPORT_DIR, "emotions.csv")
all_emotions  <- if (file.exists(emotions_path)) read.csv(emotions_path) else data.frame()
student_df    <- all_emotions[all_emotions$student_id == STUDENT_ID, ]

# Load engagement metrics
source(file.path(dirname(dirname(knitr::current_input())), "modules", "engagement_score.R"))
eng <- compute_engagement(student_df)
by_lec <- eng$by_lecture
by_stu <- eng$by_student

# Load attendance data
att_path <- file.path(EXPORT_DIR, "attendance.csv")
att_df   <- if (file.exists(att_path)) {
  att <- read.csv(att_path)
  att[att$student_id == STUDENT_ID, ]
} else data.frame()

# Fetch AI intervention plan from FastAPI
plan_text <- tryCatch({
  resp <- request(paste0(API_BASE, "/notes/", STUDENT_ID, "/plan")) |>
    req_error(is_error = function(r) FALSE) |>
    req_perform()
  if (resp_status(resp) == 200) resp_body_json(resp)$plan else "_No plan available._"
}, error = function(e) "_AI plan unavailable (API offline)._")
```

---

## 1. Executive Summary

```{r exec-summary}
if (nrow(by_stu) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf(
    "**Student ID:** %s  \n**Average Engagement:** %.2f (%s)  \n**Dominant Emotion:** %s  \n**Avg Cognitive Load:** %.2f  \n**Lectures Attended:** %d",
    STUDENT_ID,
    by_stu$avg_engagement[1],
    ifelse(by_stu$avg_engagement[1] >= 0.75, "High",
           ifelse(by_stu$avg_engagement[1] >= 0.45, "Moderate",
                  ifelse(by_stu$avg_engagement[1] >= 0.25, "Low", "Critical"))),
    if (nrow(by_lec) > 0) names(which.max(table(student_df$emotion))) else "N/A",
    by_stu$avg_cognitive_load[1],
    by_stu$lectures_attended[1]
  ))
} else {
  cat("_No data available for this student._")
}
```

---

## 2. Engagement Trend Across Lectures

```{r engagement-trend}
if (nrow(by_lec) > 0) {
  ggplot(by_lec, aes(x = lecture_id, y = engagement_score, group = 1)) +
    geom_line(colour = "#002147", size = 1) +
    geom_point(aes(colour = engagement_level), size = 3) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(High = "#1e7e34", Moderate = "#ffc107",
                                    Low = "#e67e22", Critical = "#c0392b")) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent_format()) +
    labs(x = "Lecture", y = "Engagement Score", colour = "Level") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
} else {
  cat("_No engagement data available._")
}
```

---

## 3. Emotion Distribution

```{r emotion-dist}
if (nrow(student_df) > 0) {
  emotion_colors <- c(Focused="#1e7e34", Engaged="#28a745", Confused="#ffc107",
                       Anxious="#9b59b6", Frustrated="#e67e22", Disengaged="#c0392b")
  student_df$emotion <- factor(student_df$emotion,
                                levels = names(emotion_colors))
  ggplot(student_df, aes(x = "", fill = emotion)) +
    geom_bar(width = 1) +
    coord_polar("y") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = emotion_colors) +
    labs(fill = "Emotion") +
    theme_void(base_size = 11)
} else {
  cat("_No emotion data available._")
}
```

---

## 4. Cognitive Load Timeline

```{r cog-load}
if (nrow(by_lec) > 0) {
  ggplot(by_lec, aes(x = lecture_id, y = cognitive_load, group = 1)) +
    geom_col(fill = ifelse(by_lec$cognitive_load > 0.50, "#c0392b",
                            ifelse(by_lec$cognitive_load > 0.30, "#e67e22", "#1e7e34"))) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.50, linetype = "dashed", colour = "#c0392b") +
    labs(x = "Lecture", y = "Cognitive Load  (confusion + frustration rate)") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
} else {
  cat("_No cognitive load data available._")
}
```

---

## 5. AI Intervention Plan

`r plan_text`

---

## 6. Attendance Record

```{r attendance}
if (nrow(att_df) > 0) {
  knitr::kable(
    att_df[, intersect(c("lecture_id","timestamp","status","method"), names(att_df))],
    col.names = c("Lecture", "Timestamp", "Status", "Method")[
      seq_along(intersect(c("lecture_id","timestamp","status","method"), names(att_df)))
    ],
    align = "llcc"
  )
} else {
  cat("_No attendance records available._")
}
```
